Let's get your school set up

This takes about two minutes.

Welcome!

Let's get more voices involved at your school.

How it works

We do it through Class Meetings.

  • ✓Led by pupils, not the teacher.
  • ✓5-10 minutes long
  • ✓Use a ready-made topic, or set your own question

Which classes will take part in Class Meetings?

Paste or type the class names below.

You can always add or change classes later.

Choose a topic for your first Class Meeting

Pick your first question

Tap a question to select it. This is how it will appear to your pupils.

Or write your own

When might you run your first Class Meeting?

Pick the option that works best for you.

Pupil voice starts here. Good luck with your first meeting! 🎉

What are the answer options?

Add up to 5 options for pupils to choose from.

🖼️

Want images for your answer options?

Our team can add images to make your first Class Meeting even more engaging. We'll sort it before your login is ready.

Your first Class Meeting is ready

We're so happy to be helping you to get more voices involved at your school.

Your login will arrive within 24 hours.
